disclaimer: Not financial advice. High-leverage crypto futures carry a high risk of total loss. Never risk money you can't afford to lose.
start_welcome:
Welcome to Lifechange Crypto VIP.

This is the inside room: live trade ideas, entries, leverage, SL and TP levels, and the reasoning behind each one — for education, so you can learn to read the market yourself.

Pick your language to continue.
language_set: Language set to English. Let's get you set up.
main_menu_header:
How would you like to get in?

{disclaimer}
trial_intro:
Free 30-day VIP trial — here's how it works:

1. Register on Bitunix using THIS link (it has to be our link, that's how we recognize you):
{referral_link}

2. Fund your account with at least {min_balance} USDT (this stays your money — it's your trading capital, not a fee to us).

3. Send me your Bitunix UID (open the app → Profile → tap your UID to copy it).

Note: Bitunix is an exchange we partner with. It is not licensed or regulated. Trading is educational and entirely at your own risk.

{disclaimer}
trial_ask_uid: Send me your Bitunix UID now — numbers only (for example: 88761234).
trial_bad_uid_format: That doesn't look like a Bitunix UID. It should be numbers only, no spaces or letters. Open Bitunix → Profile → tap your UID to copy it, then paste it here.
trial_uid_already_used: That UID has already been used for a trial. Each Bitunix account gets one free trial, ever. If you think this is a mistake, contact support.
trial_rate_limited: You're sending UIDs a bit fast. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
trial_checking: Got it — checking your Bitunix account now. This takes a moment.
trial_ask_screenshot: Almost there. Send ONE screenshot that shows your Bitunix account registered under our code and your deposit. This helps us confirm it quickly.
trial_needs_manual:
Thanks — we've got your details and we're reviewing them manually now. This is usually quick (we clear the queue a couple of times a day). You'll get a message here the moment you're approved.

{disclaimer}
trial_rejected:
We couldn't verify a qualifying deposit under our referral link for that UID yet.

Make sure you: (1) registered with OUR link, and (2) have at least {min_balance} USDT currently in the account. Once that's done, send your UID again.
trial_need_proof: We need a clearer screenshot to confirm. Please send one image showing your Bitunix account (registered under our code) and your current balance.
paid_invoice_expired: That invoice expired before payment. No problem — tap a plan again to get a fresh one.
vip_welcome_dm:
You're in. Welcome to the Lifechange Crypto VIP room.

What to do first:
• Turn on notifications for the group so you don't miss live entries.
• Read each idea fully — entry zone, leverage, SL and TP are there for a reason.
• Manage your own risk on every position. Size small while you learn.

Everything here is shared for education — to help you learn to trade, not as a promise of any outcome.

{disclaimer}
admin_action_approved: Approved trial #{id}. User notified and invite sent.
admin_action_needproof: Asked user for better proof on trial #{id}.
admin_action_already_done: Trial #{id} was already decided. No change.
admin_queue_empty: Queue is clear — no trials waiting.
admin_token_expired_alert: Heads up: the Bitunix partner token looks expired or errored ({reason}). Auto-verify is falling back to manual review. Refresh BITUNIX_PARTNER_TOKEN when you can.
cadence_welcome:
Settling into the VIP room? Quick tip: open every idea and follow the SL and TP — that's where the learning is. Manage your own risk on each one.

{disclaimer}
cadence_mid:
You're halfway through your access. How's it going? If the room's been useful for learning how the entries are built, you can lock in continued access any time from the menu.

{disclaimer}
cadence_warn3d:
Your VIP access ends in 3 days. To keep the live ideas coming without a break, you can renew from the menu whenever you're ready.

{disclaimer}
cadence_lastday:
Last day of your VIP access. After today you'll lose the live room until you renew. Renew any time from the menu to stay in.

{disclaimer}
cadence_winback:
Your VIP access has ended and you've been removed from the room. The door's still open — renew from the menu and you'll be back in right away.

{disclaimer}
expired_removed_renew:
Your VIP access has expired, so you've been removed from the group. Renew any time from the menu to rejoin.

{disclaimer}
cancelled: Cancelled. Open the menu any time with /start.
error_try_again: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
not_entitled: You don't have active VIP access right now. Open /start to begin a trial or subscribe.
trial_already_active: You already have active VIP access. 🎟
